title: China sends aid to Cuba amid a harsh US blockade
full_text:
China sends aid to Cuba amid a harsh US blockade
China sends aid to Cuba amid a harsh US blockade
Cuba has received 15,000 tonnes of rice from China via the port of Havana. This is part of a 60,000-tonne aid package as a harsh US blockade fuels the island’s worst economic crisis in decades.
Published On 24 May 2026
